title: Valentine's Pepsi (Food and Weapons)
description: Adds Valentine's favorite things such as Pepsi and Care Bears
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6366b33a9db8735384db5548060bdbd4b3c2e8c8.png)

This is a mod my girlfriend and I made for our modpack that we play together.
I do most of the programming and she helps give ideas and does some textures

The "More Decor" Update is proving to be more complicated then we thought. We have decided to put it on hold for now and focus on other, more interesting, worthwhile fun things to add!
Stay in tune for planned future updates!


**Future Updates**
- Cool Weapons
- More Decor
- Biomes and Wood types
- Horror/Halloween Update
- Pets

(some assets are used/edited without permission.)
